programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: In this tribute to 1950s monster movies two old gentlemanly friends are playing a game of chess when a sinister telepathic alien invader shaped like a giant tentacled eyeball arrives to eat their brains

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Ben suggests to his newlywed son John and daughter-in-law Kate to spend their wedding night in the same hotel room where he spent his honeymoon When a mysterious woman kidnaps John there ashamed Ben reveals his secret to Kate

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In part one an alcoholic professor helps a former student In the second part a womans computer begins talking to her

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: Ape shrinks to a six-inch ape when a chemical spills on him in The Incredible Shrinking Grape A talking duck appeals to the pair for help claiming to be a young man suffering from a Harmits jealous spell in Whats A Nice Prince Like You Doin In A Duck Like That

programme.title: Hong 107
programme.desc: Hong 107

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A jaded has-been photographer plots the demise of his younger talented protégé when they go on assignment in Central America

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A man murders his beautiful younger wife when she threatens to leave him He then packs her body in a big suitcase and boards a train where he is stalked by an inquisitive detective

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A cursed antique harp becomes the motive for murder and the focus of Nicks investigation

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A Nazi scientist uses a cursed amulet to bring a Nazi colonel back to life in order to kill Jack and his old army buddies

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is jealous of the Skipper when he saves Mary Ann from drowning But he may get his chance to be a hero yet when a headhunter takes the other castaways prisoner

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa has a cold but he doesnt trust the new doctor - or any doctor for that matter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Grampa refuses to give him a raise Pepino quits and goes to work for neighbor George MacMichael

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is moonlighting as a private investigator when cutbacks hit CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS can send out sonic booms at will and threatens New York City with one

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pamela Gerard escapes from a mental institution and hitches a ride with BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is offered a promotion and transfer up to Fleet HQ but must first reconcile a shortage in the bases equipment inventory After all is accounted for except for one item - A barrage balloon - McHale and The Crew must race against time in order to locate it and bring it in in time for Binghamton to be shipped out

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A business venture - Involving the manufacture and sale of sarongs to the Base personnel - Has the guys divided into two separate quarreling groups When the feud escalates Binghamton tries to take advantage of its effect on them during a PT Crew efficiency test - Their failure of which would mean their being shipped out for re-assignment

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Mikey And Nick
programme.desc: Nicky is on the run from the mob and he turns to old pal Mikey for help

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: Academy Award® winners Robert DeNiro and Al Pacino head a stellar cast in this taut psychological drama about an obsessive detective and a brilliant thief whose fates are linked in the aftermath of a high-stakes securities heist As the criminal plans his final heist their personal lives begin to unravel as they engage in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse leading the adversaries to come to hate and respect one another

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Away All Boats
programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.title: Bullwinkle 110
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 110

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke get jobs hauling wrecked cars to demolition derby operator Augie Detweiller unaware he and Boss have schemed to hide stolen engines under the hood When they are suspected of smuggling the stolen engines into Hazzard Bo agrees to become a driver in an upcoming event to find out the truth

programme.title: Hercules 209
programme.desc: Hercules 209

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A new inter-dimensional portal system for human travel turns out to be something more when the resistance discover a CVI in a boy who got lost in the system

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Many centuries ago one alien ship crashed on earth The surviving aliens were defeated by a local Indian tribe The modern day aliens attempt to acquire the ship to assist in their subjugation of the planet

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: An attractive reporter arrives unannounced to interview Arcane but she is not what she seems and her hidden agenda threatens both the doctor and the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing helps Cathy comprehend her late alienated mother by showing her visions of her mothers teen-age life

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: An Eagle is sent onto the surface of the planet Psychon which has titanium needed for repairs to the Alpha Base It fails to return and is used by Psychon scientist Mentor as bait with which to entice other members of the Alphan crew onto the planet Mentor is building a biological computer that will hopefully transform his deteriorating planet back into the Eden it once was However the machine can only be fueled by the living brains of humans and Mentor has his eye on those of the Alphan crew Fortunately Mentor is not alone on the planet; his innocent daughter the shape-shifting Maya is unaware of her fathers plans so Koenig tries to convince her to side with the Alphans

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force mixes dinner and danger at a crime czars private party Jack Wellman has arranged the deaths of four Government officials so he can fill the vacancies with men he controls

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Joe and Bill are assigned a task to find a purse snatcher They are surprised to learn it is a dog snatching the purses

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Lt Gerard agrees to work with Kimble for 24 hours to prove his innocence because someone who may have been there when his wife was killed posted bail for the one-armed man

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An old love of Heaths who had jilted him five years before convinces him to help get her Mexican husband to the US The husband is a Revolutionary wanted by the Federales - and a man with questionable motives

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Arrested and accused of robbery in Lone Butte Cheyenne escapes to clear his name The only clues he has are the location of the gangs well-guarded hideout and that the killer was wearing an unusual gold lions head belt buckle

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 28 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Derek Lapierre vs. Madison Mejia; Justin Hill vs. Cody Puls; Joshua Ferguson vs. Curtis Richard; Matthew McCormick vs. Lee Ruff.

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
